---
title: "Daniel IAO"
subtitle: "Academic & Consultant"
about:
  template: trestles
  image-width: 14em
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - text: "{{< ai orcid >}}"
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-0394-3827
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/YOUR-LINKEDIN-USERNAME
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/danieliavila
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: "mailto:daniel.avila@su.se"
  #type: grid                 # Options: grid, default (list), or table
  #sort: "date desc"          # Sorts newest projects first
  #categories: true           # Adds clickable category tags (e.g., "Python", "R")
---


## Overview
Welcome to my research, consultancy and opinion portfolio. My work focuses on sustainability sciences at large with a special focus on industrial ecology, social-ecological systems and social ecology. While I mostly engage with quantitative analyses, I have also explored and applied qualitative methodologies spanning workshops, reviews, interviews, among others. At my core, I approach this with a complex systems lens. 

This portal serves as an interactive hub for my on-going projects, including materials prepared for the **World Biodiversity Forum at Davos, Switzerland**.

My ongoing projects are mostly associated with my PhD at the [Stockholm Resilience Centre | Stockholm University](https://www.stockholmresilience.org), including:

### Research 
- [Accounting for biodiversity impacts of consumption and production: current gaps and frontiers.](research/art1-phd.qmd) 
- [The Hidden Cost of Biodiversity and Land Use: How Ecological Models Shape our Biodiversity Metrics.](research/art3-phd.qmd)
- [Planetary Bundles Embedded in trade.](research/art3-phd.qmd)
- [Historical Agronomic Dataset - Insights from Mexico (2012 - 2022). Expanded and harmonized version.](research/art5-phd.qmd)

### Teaching
- 
- 

<!--
## Key Focus Areas
* **-----:**
* **-----:**
* **Corporate Sustainability:** 
-->
